title: gymnadenia conopsea var. angustifolia
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved fragrant orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. The narrow-leaved fragrant orchid has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, coughs, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
